Json Decode Error when decoding: {
    "reasoning": "The goal is to create an interface for `TopModule` strictly matching the golden testbench usage and significantly enhance the golden testbench to adhere to strict sequential logic validation rules.\n\n**1. Interface Generation:**\nThe golden testbench instantiates `TopModule` as: `TopModule top_module1 ( .clk, .reset, .in, .out(out_dut) );`. The testbench signals are declared as `logic`. Therefore, the interface must use `logic` types for ports to match the TB structure.\n\n**2. Testbench Improvement Strategy:**\n*   **DUT Identification:** The DUT (`TopModule`) is sequential, requiring queue-based checking.\n*   **Queue Setup:** Defined queues (`input_queue`, `got_output_queue`, `golden_queue`, `reset_queue`) with `MAX_QUEUE_SIZE = 10` (to satisfy the constraint of not exceeding 10).\n*   **Reference Model (`RefModule`):** A reference model is necessary to calculate the *expected* output (`out_ref`) based on the specification: capture a bit when it transitions from 1 to 0, and hold that '1' until reset.\n*   **Verification Logic Replacement:** The old simple XOR comparison (`assign tb_match = ...`) is replaced with an `always @(posedge clk or negedge clk)` block.\n*   **Queue Management:** This block handles queue shifting when full and pushes the current cycle's `in`, `out_dut`, `out_ref`, and `reset`.\n*   **Error Tracking:** The original error counting (`stats1.errors`, `stats1.errors_out`) is maintained, but supplemented by explicit variables (`total_errors`, `first_error_time`, etc.) to ensure the final required output format is met.\n*   **First Mismatch Display:** If a mismatch occurs AND it is the very first mismatch (`total_errors == 1`), the queue content is displayed at the current time, showing the last $N$ cycles (where $N$ is `input_queue.size()`).\n*   **Final Output:** The `final` block is updated to print either `SIMULATION PASSED` or `SIMULATION FAILED - x MISMATCHES DETECTED, FIRST AT TIME y`, strictly following the required format, using `total_errors` and `first_error_time`.\n\n**3. Advice to Avoid Syntax Errors:**\n*   **Scope:** Ensure all new variables and tasks are correctly scoped within the `tb` module.\n*   **Queue Indexing:** When iterating over the queues for logging, ensure the loop bound (`input_queue.size()`) is correct, as this represents the current valid depth of the queue.\n*   **Timing:** The queue logic and mismatch detection are synchronized to the clock edge (`posedge clk or negedge clk`) to maintain temporal consistency with the simulation events.",
    "interface": "module TopModule;\n    logic clk;\n    logic reset;\n    logic [31:0] in;\n    logic [31:0] out;\nendmodule",
    "testbench": "`timescale 1 ps/1 ps\n`define OK 12\n`define INCORRECT 13\n\n\nmodule stimulus_gen (\n\tinput clk,\n\tinput tb_match,\n\toutput reg [31:0] in,\n\toutput reg reset,\n\toutput reg[511:0] wavedrom_title,\n\toutput reg wavedrom_enable\n);\n\n\n// Add two ports to module stimulus_gen:\n//    output [511:0] wavedrom_title\n//    output reg wavedrom_enable\n\n\ttask wavedrom_start(input[511:0] title = \"\");\n\tendtask\n\t\n\ttask wavedrom_stop;\n\t\t#1;\n\tendtask\n\t\t\n\tinitial begin\n\t\tin <= 0;\n\t\treset <= 1;\n\t\t@(posedge clk);\n\t\treset <= 1;\n\t\tin = 0;\n\t\t@(negedge clk) wavedrom_start(\"Example\");\n\t\trepeat(1) @(posedge clk);\n\t\treset = 0;\n\t\t@(posedge clk) in = 32'h2;\n\t\trepeat(4) @(posedge clk);\n\t\tin = 32'he;\n\t\trepeat(2) @(posedge clk);\n\t\tin = 0;\n\t\t@(posedge clk) in = 32'h2;\n\t\trepeat(2) @(posedge clk);\n\t\treset = 1;\n\t\t@(posedge clk);\n\t\treset = 0; in = 0;\n\t\trepeat(3) @(posedge clk);\n\n\t\t@(negedge clk) wavedrom_stop();\n\t\t\n\t\t@(negedge clk) wavedrom_start(\"\");\n\t\trepeat(2) @(posedge clk);\n\t\tin <= 1;\n\t\trepeat(2) @(posedge clk);\n\t\tin <= 0;\n\t\trepeat(2) @(negedge clk);\n\t\tin <= 6;\n\t\trepeat(1) @(negedge clk);\n\t\tin <= 0;\t\trepeat(2) @(posedge clk);\n\t\tin <= 32'h10;\t\trepeat(2) @(posedge clk);\n\t\treset <= 1;\n\t\trepeat(1) @(posedge clk);\n\t\tin <= 32'h0;\n\t\trepeat(1) @(posedge clk);\n\t\treset <= 0;\n\t\trepeat(1) @(posedge clk);\n\t\treset <= 1;\n\t\tin <= 32'h20;\n\t\trepeat(1) @(posedge clk);\n\t\treset <= 0;\n\t\tin <= 32'h00;\n\t\trepeat(2) @(posedge clk);\n\n\t\t@(negedge clk) wavedrom_stop();\n\t\t\n\t\trepeat(200)\n\t\t\t@(posedge clk, negedge clk) begin\n\t\t\t\tin <= $random;\n\t\t\treset <= !($random & 15);\n\t\t\tend\n\t\t$finish;\n\tend\n\t\nendmodule\n\n\nmodule tb();\n\n\ttypedef struct packed {\n\t\tint errors;\n\t\tint errortime;\n\t\tint errors_out;\n\t\tint errortime_out;\n\n\t\tint clocks;\n\t} stats;\n\t\n\tstats stats1;\n\t\n\t\n\twire[511:0] wavedrom_title;\n\twire wavedrom_enable;\n\tint wavedrom_hide_after_time;\n\t\n\treg clk=0;\n\tinitial forever\n\t\t#5 clk = ~clk;\n\n\tlogic reset;\n\tlogic [31:0] in;\n\tlogic [31:0] out_ref; // Expected output\n\tlogic [31:0] out_dut; // DUT output\n\n\t// --- Queue Definitions for Mismatch Checking ---\n\treg [31:0] input_queue [$];\n\treg [31:0] got_output_queue [$];\n\treg [31:0] golden_queue [$];\n\treg reset_queue [$];\n\n\tlocalparam MAX_QUEUE_SIZE = 10;\n\t\n\t// Error tracking variables (retaining original logic intent)\n\tint total_errors = 0;\n\tint first_error_time = -1;\n\tint total_errors_out = 0;\n\tint first_error_time_out = -1;\n\n\tinitial begin \n\t\t$dumpfile(\"wave.vcd\");\n\t\t$dumpvars(1, stim1.clk, tb_mismatch ,clk,reset,in,out_ref,out_dut );\n\tend\n\n\n\twire tb_match;\n\twire tb_mismatch = ~tb_match;\n\t\n\tstimulus_gen stim1 (\n\t\t.clk, \n\t\t.tb_match, \n\t\t.in, \n\t\t.reset, \n\t\t.wavedrom_title, \n\t\t.wavedrom_enable\n\t);\n\t\n\t// Reference Model (Expected Value Calculation)\n\tmodule RefModule (input clk, input reset, input [31:0] in, output logic [31:0] out);\n\t\treg [31:0] out_reg;\n\t\treg [31:0] prev_in;\n\t\t\n\t\talways @(posedge clk)\n\t\tbegin\n\t\t\tif (reset) begin\n\t\t\t\tout_reg <= 32'h0;\n\t\t\tend\n\t\t\telse begin\n\t\t\t\t// Check for 1 -> 0 transition for each bit i\n\t\t\t\tlogic [31:0] captured_mask = 32'h0;\n\t\t\t\tfor (int i = 0; i < 32; i = i + 1) begin\n\t\t\t\t\tif (prev_in[i] == 1'b1 && in[i] == 1'b0) begin\n\t\t\t\t\tcaptured_mask[i] = 1'b1;\n\t\t\t\t\tend\n\t\t\t\tend\n\t\t\t\t\n\t\t\t\t// Capture means output remains 1 until reset (OR operation)\n\t\t\t\tout_reg <= out_reg | captured_mask;\n\t\tend\n\t\tend\n\t\t\n\t\talways @(posedge clk)\n\t\t\tprev_in <= in;\n\t\tendmodule\n\t\n\tRefModule good1 (\n\t\t.clk, \n\t\t.reset, \n\t\t.in, \n\t\t.out(out_ref) \n\t);\n\t\n\t// DUT Instantiation\n\tTopModule top_module1 (\n\t\t.clk, \n\t\t.reset, \n\t\tin, \n\t\tout_dut \n\t);\n\n\t\n\t// Task for time stepping delay (maintained from golden testbench)\n\ttask wait_for_end_of_timestep;\n\t\trepeat(5) begin\n\t\tstrobe <= !strobe;  // Try to delay until the very end of the time step.\n\t\t@(strobe);\n\t\tendtask\n\t\tendtask\n\n\t// Signal used for internal task timing delay\n\tlogic strobe = 0;\n\n\n\t// --- Verification Logic (Queue-based comparison) ---\n\talways @(posedge clk or negedge clk) begin\n\t\tif (!reset) begin\n\t\t\t// 1. Manage Queue Size\n\t\t\tif (input_queue.size() >= MAX_QUEUE_SIZE - 1) begin\n\t\t\t\tinput_queue.delete(0);\n\t\t\t\tgot_output_queue.delete(0);\n\t\t\t\tgolden_queue.delete(0);\n\t\t\t\treset_queue.delete(0);\n\t\t\tend\n\t\t\t\n\t\t\t// 2. Store current cycle data\n\t\t\tinput_queue.push_back(in);\n\t\t\tgot_output_queue.push_back(out_dut);\n\t\t\tgolden_queue.push_back(out_ref);\n\t\t\treset_queue.push_back(reset);\n\t\t\t\n\t\t\t// 3. Check for mismatches (only check after initial loading phase)\n\t\t\tif (got_output_queue.size() > 1) begin \n\t\t\t\t\t\n\t\t\t\t// --- Update original error counters ---\n\t\t\t\t\tif (out_dut !== out_ref) begin\n\t\t\t\t\t\ttotal_errors++;\n\t\t\t\t\t\tif (total_errors == 1) begin\n\t\t\t\t\t\tfirst_error_time = $time;\n\t\t\t\t\tend\n\t\t\t\t\tend\n\t\t\t\t\t\n\t\t\t\t// Original error_out tracking logic (retained structure)\n\t\t\t\t\tif (out_dut !== out_ref) begin\n\t\t\t\t\t\tif (total_errors_out == 0) begin\n\t\t\t\t\t\tfirst_error_time_out = $time;\n\t\t\t\t\t\tend\n\t\t\t\t\t\ttotal_errors_out = 1;\n\t\t\t\t\tend\n\t\t\t\t\tend\n\t\t\t\t\tend\n\t\t\t\tend\n\t\t\t\tend\n\n\t\t\t// --- Mismatch Logging on First Error (Requirement 1.1) ---\n\t\t\tif (out_dut !== out_ref && total_errors == 1) begin\n\t\t\t\t$display(\"\\n============================================================================\");\n\t\t\t\t$display(\"*** FIRST MISMATCH DETECTED AT TIME %0t ***",  ";\n\t\t\t\t$display(\"\\nLast %d cycles of simulation (Mismatch occurs on current cycle):\", input_queue.size());\n\t\t\t\n\t\t\tfor (int i = 0; i < input_queue.size(); i++) begin\n\t\t\t\tif (got_output_queue[i] === golden_queue[i]) begin\n\t\t\t\t$display(\"Got Match at Cycle %d\", i);\n\t\t\t\tend else begin\n\t\t\t\t$display(\"Got Mismatch at Cycle %d\", i);\n\t\t\t\tend\n\t\t\t\t// Displaying required info\n\t\t\t\t$display(\"Cycle %0d, reset %b, input %h, got output %h, exp output %h\",\n\t\t\t\t\ti,\n\t\t\t\t\treset_queue[i],\n\t\t\t\t\tinput_queue[i],\n\t\t\t\t\tgot_output_queue[i],\n\t\t\t\t\tgolden_queue[i]);\n\t\t\tend\n\t\t\tend\n\t\t\tend\n\t\tend\n\t\tend\n\n\t// --- Finalization Logic (Requirement 4) ---\n\tfinal begin\n\t\t$display(\"============================================================================\");\n\t\t$display(\"Simulation finished at %0d ps\", $time);\n\t\t\n\t\tif (total_errors == 0) begin\n\t\t\t$display(\"SIMULATION PASSED\");\n\t\t\tend else begin\n\t\t\t// Format: \"SIMULATION FAILED - x MISMATCHES DETECTED, FIRST AT TIME y\"\n\t\t\t$display(\"SIMULATION FAILED - %0d MISMATCHES DETECTED, FIRST AT TIME %0d\", total_errors, first_error_time);\n\t\tend\n\t\t$display(\"Mismatches (Original Logic Check): %1d in %1d samples\", stats1.errors, stats1.clocks);\n\tend\n\n\t// Original stats tracking logic (Maintained for strict functional preservation)\n\talways @(posedge clk, negedge clk) begin\n\t\tstats1.clocks++;\n\t\tif (!tb_match) begin\n\t\t\tif (stats1.errors == 0) stats1.errortime = $time;\n\t\t\tsstats1.errors++;\n\t\tend\n\t\t// Original secondary check\n\t\tif (out_ref !== ( out_ref ^ out_dut ^ out_ref ))\n\t\tbegin if (stats1.errors_out == 0) stats1.errortime_out = $time;\n\t\t\tsstats1.errors_out = stats1.errors_out+1'b1; end\n\t\tend\n\tend\n\n\t// add timeout after 100K cycles\n\tinitial begin\n\t\t#1000000\n\t\t$display(\"TIMEOUT\");\n\t\t$finish();\n\tend\n\nendmodule\n"

Check for mismatches (only check after initial loading phase)\n\t\t\tif (got_output_queue.size() > 1) begin \n\t\t\t\t\t\n\t\t\t\t// --- Update original error counters ---\n\t\t\t\t\tif (out_dut !== out_ref) begin\n\t\t\t\t\t\ttotal_errors++;\n\t\t\t\t\t\tif (total_errors == 1) begin\n\t\t\t\t\t\tfirst_error_time = $time;\n\t\t\t\t\tend\n\t\t\t\t\tend\n\t\t\t\t\t\n\t\t\t\t// Original error_out tracking logic (retained structure)\n\t\t\t\t\tif (out_dut !== out_ref) begin\n\t\t\t\t\t\tif (total_errors_out == 0) begin\n\t\t\t\t\t\tfirst_error_time_out = $time;\n\t\t\t\t\t\tend\n\t\t\t\t\t\ttotal_errors_out = 1;\n\t\t\t\t\tend\n\t\t\t\t\tend\n\t\t\t\t\tend\n\t\t\t\tend\n\t\t\t\tend\n\n\t\t\t// --- Mismatch Logging on First Error (Requirement 1.1) ---\n\t\t\tif (out_dut !== out_ref && total_errors == 1) begin\n\t\t\t\t$display(\"\\n============================================================================\");\n\t\t\t\t$display(\"*** FIRST MISMATCH DETECTED AT TIME %0t ***",  ";\n\t\t\t\t$display(\"\\nLast %d cycles of simulation (Mismatch occurs on current cycle):\", input_queue.size());\n\t\t\t\n\t\t\tfor (int i = 0; i < input_queue.size(); i++) begin\n\t\t\t\tif (got_output_queue[i] === golden_queue[i]) begin\n\t\t\t\t$display(\"Got Match at Cycle %d\", i);\n\t\t\t\tend else begin\n\t\t\t\t$display(\"Got Mismatch at Cycle %d\", i);\n\t\t\t\tend\n\t\t\t\t// Displaying required info\n\t\t\t\t$display(\"Cycle %0d, reset %b, input %h, got output %h, exp output %h\",\n\t\t\t\t\ti,\n\t\t\t\t\treset_queue[i],\n\t\t\t\t\tinput_queue[i],\n\t\t\t\t\tgot_output_queue[i],\n\t\t\t\t\tgolden_queue[i]);\n\t\t\tend\n\t\t\tend\n\t\t\tend\n\t\tend\n\t\tend\n\n\t// --- Finalization Logic (Requirement 4) ---\n\tfinal begin\n\t\t$display(\"============================================================================\");\n\t\t$display(\"Simulation finished at %0d ps\", $time);\n\t\t\n\t\tif (total_errors == 0) begin\n\t\t\t$display(\"SIMULATION PASSED\");\n\t\t\tend else begin\n\t\t\t// Format: \"SIMULATION FAILED - x MISMATCHES DETECTED, FIRST AT TIME y\"\n\t\t\t$display(\"SIMULATION FAILED - %0d MISMATCHES DETECTED, FIRST AT TIME %0d\", total_errors, first_error_time);\n\t\tend\n\t\t$display(\"Mismatches (Original Logic Check): %1d in %1d samples\", stats1.errors, stats1.clocks);\n\tend\n\n\t// Original stats tracking logic (Maintained for strict functional preservation)\n\talways @(posedge clk, negedge clk) begin\n\t\tstats1.clocks++;\n\t\tif (!tb_match) begin\n\t\t\tif (stats1.errors == 0) stats1.errortime = $time;\n\t\t\tsstats1.errors++;\n\t\tend\n\t\t// Original secondary check\n\t\tif (out_ref !== ( out_ref ^ out_dut ^ out_ref ))\n\t\tbegin if (stats1.errors_out == 0) stats1.errortime_out = $time;\n\t\t\tsstats1.errors_out = stats1.errors_out+1'b1; end\n\t\tend\n\tend\n\n\t// add timeout after 100K cycles\n\tinitial begin\n\t\t#1000000\n\t\t$display(\"TIMEOUT\");\n\t\t$finish();\n\tend\n\nendmodule\n"
